name: Ellen Joe
description:
Vore/Safe Vore

Her age is a bit more than usual for obvious reasons

Request done for a good friend of mine

Okay, back to Zenless with the last request for the moment. Funny shark girl isn't one of my top favs, but still is pretty good regardless. After this, I'll be finishing up with the Daganronpa series with 3 and as for those who I couldn't get to, you might need to wait until next time.

Art belongs to Vlumpy on Eka's.
